tool_args.label: Minutes - Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committees - April 29, 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees Monday, April 29, 2024. Meeting held at 2 Broadway – 20th Floor New York, New York 10004 9:30 a.m.

payload.title: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees Monday, April 29, 2024

tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees Monday, April 29, 2024
Minutes of the Regular Meeting Joint Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North Railroad Committees

payload.title: Senior Vice President, Railroads Business Unit, MTA Construction and Development

tool_args.raw_text: MTA Construction & Development is currently in the midst of a large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct. Phase 1 of the construction spans from 115th to 123rd Streets on Park Avenue.

payload.description: MTA Construction & Development is currently in the midst of a large-scale replacement project for the Park Avenue Viaduct. Phase 1 spans from 115th to 123rd Streets on Park Avenue. Progress includes replacing 2,200 feet of steel third rail with new aluminum third rail, relocating signal power feeder and communication cables. One of two gantry systems has been erected. The structure dates back to the late 1800s and carries approximately 750 trains and thousands of customers to and from Grand Central Terminal every weekday.

tool_args.raw_text: implementing a new Climate Resilience Roadmap. This comprehensive strategy will necessitate a $6 billion investment over the next decade to fortify Metro-North's infrastructure against the challenges posed by climate change.

payload.description: MTA has embarked on implementing a new Climate Resilience Roadmap. Comprehensive strategy will necessitate a $6 billion investment over the next decade to fortify Metro-North's infrastructure against climate change.

tool_args.raw_text: elevation of the Harlem Line signal box at MP 25.7 located at the grade crossing at Cleveland Street and Lakeview Avenue. This elevation project addresses recurring flooding issues

payload.project_name: Harlem Line signal box elevation at MP 25.7
payload.location: grade crossing at Cleveland Street and Lakeview Avenue
payload.description: Elevating the signal box with additional standard 4-foot signal foundations and repurposing available materials, such as reclaimed concrete ties and recycled ballast, to address recurring flooding issues.

location_normalized.raw_text: grade crossing at Cleveland Street and Lakeview Avenue

tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North recently received $20 million from the State budget for an initial investment in Hudson Line resiliency.

payload.description: Metro-North received $20 million from the State budget for an initial investment in Hudson Line resiliency.

tool_args.raw_text: LIRR on behalf of itself and Metro-North seeks Board approval for a public works contract to Sperry Rail, Inc. for Rail Flaw Testing and Joint Bar Inspection services. The contract has a term of 5 years.

payload.project_name: Rail Flaw Testing and Joint Bar Inspection services contract with Sperry Rail, Inc.
payload.description: LIRR on behalf of itself and Metro-North seeks Board approval for a public works contract to Sperry Rail, Inc. for Rail Flaw Testing and Joint Bar Inspection services. Term of 5 years. Contract price approximately $41.3 million for both railroads for the full five-year term. Will provide FRA mandated inspection utilizing latest technologies in ultrasonic testing, joint bar detection, and eddy current testing.

tool_args.raw_text: On April 9th, Metro-North set a post-Covid record of 228,390 riders.

tool_args.raw_text: For the first time, Metro-North and LIRR, upstairs at Grand Central Terminal and downstairs in Grand Central Madison, combined to serve over a quarter million customers in a single day.

payload.context: first time Metro-North and LIRR combined to serve over a quarter million customers in a single day

tool_args.raw_text: the Committee approved the minutes of the March 25, 2024 Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committee meeting.

payload.description: Committee approved the minutes of the March 25, 2024 Joint LIRR and Metro-North Committee meeting.

tool_args.raw_text: On April 9th, Metro-North set a post-Covid record of 228,390 riders.

payload.description: Metro-North set a post-Covid record of 228,390 riders.

tool_args.raw_text: Yankees' Opening Day took place on Friday, April 5.

payload.description: Yankees' Opening Day. Metro-North provides extra services including Yankee Clipper trains.

tool_args.raw_text: on April 23, Metro-North hosted the first 'Connect With Us' session of 2024, which was held at Fordham Station.

payload.description: Metro-North hosted the first 'Connect With Us' session of 2024 at Fordham Station.

tool_args.raw_text: on April 26, she joined the New York State Department of Agriculture and Markets Commissioner Richard Ball at Grand Central Terminal to celebrate the reopening of the Taste NY store.

payload.description: Celebrated the reopening of the Taste NY store at Grand Central Terminal.

tool_args.raw_text: On April 20, Metro-North held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon to highlight opportunities for skilled craft jobs at the railroad.

payload.description: Metro-North held a recruitment Open House at Croton-Harmon. 585 potential job applicants attended, exceeding the anticipated 300.

tool_args.raw_text: The May 20 timetable change will feature the usual extra service to the East End, but this year, the LIRR is extending the 5:13 PM train from Penn Station to Montauk on summer Thursdays

payload.description: LIRR summer timetable change featuring extra service to the East End and extending the 5:13 PM train from Penn Station to Montauk on summer Thursdays.

tool_args.raw_text: LIRR added a new Port Washington Branch train to the daily schedule on April 15. This new train from Great Neck to Grand Central is meant to help alleviate crowding on the existing Penn Station train departing Port Washington.

payload.description: LIRR added a new Port Washington Branch train to the daily schedule. New train from Great Neck to Grand Central departing at 7:53 AM.

tool_args.raw_text: LIRR recently completed seven planned grade crossing rehabilitations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, and four others between the Montauk and Port Jefferson Branches.

payload.description: LIRR completed seven planned grade crossing rehabilitations between Ronkonkoma and Greenport, and four others between the Montauk and Port Jefferson Branches. Restored train service three weeks earlier than planned.

tool_args.raw_text: On April 21, the Corporate Safety department hosted 'Operation East Bound and Down', an emergency preparedness drill in coordination with Stony Brook South Hampton Hospital, East End emergency response organizations, and the Town of East Hampton.

payload.description: Corporate Safety department hosted 'Operation East Bound and Down', an emergency preparedness drill in coordination with Stony Brook South Hampton Hospital, East End emergency response organizations, and the Town of East Hampton.

tool_args.raw_text: On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered, making it the oldest railroad in the country operating under its original name. LIRR had its birthday celebration at Grand Central Madison on April 24

payload.description: LIRR 190th Anniversary celebration at Grand Central Madison. On April 24, 1834, the Long Island Rail Road was chartered.
